description: DiD validation configs generated from strong Lasso interactions

combinations.name: DID_001_InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg__branch-fold_BASE
combinations.description: Baseline (both enabled) for InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg x branch-fold

combinations.name: DID_001_InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg__branch-fold_MIR_OFF
combinations.description: Disable MIR InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg only (LLVM branch-fold enabled)

combinations.name: DID_001_InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg__branch-fold_LLVM_OFF
combinations.description: Disable LLVM branch-fold only (MIR InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg enabled)

combinations.name: DID_001_InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg__branch-fold_BOTH_OFF
combinations.description: Disable both MIR InstSimplify-after-simplifycfg and LLVM branch-fold

combinations.name: DID_002_GVN__branch-fold_BOTH_OFF
